rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mo By State For Summary Judgment Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication, Calendar Motion: Summary Judgment, Calendar Motion: Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT FAILED TO MAINTAIN SUMMARY JUDGMENT BURDEN WITH REGARD TO GOVERNMENT CODE 835 CAUSE OF ACTION. GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO 1)NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 815; 2)SF PUBLIC WORKS 706 CAUSE OF ACTION PURSUANT TO BAME; 3) STREETS AND HIGHWAY 5610 CAUSE OF ACTION PURSUANT TO WILLIAMS; AND 4)FAILURE TO INSPECT CAUSE OF ACTION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT SECTION 818.6.
